articles.title: Wemby rues costly turnover as Spurs fall in Game 2 of NBA Finals - ESPN
articles.description: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama admitted urgency got the better of him when he committed a late turnover in Friday's Game 2 loss, but he said he would use the frustration as fuel for the next game.

articles.title: Turning Point: Knicks get close calls, big plays in final moments - NBA.com
articles.description: Game 2 of the NBA Finals had several turning points, and the Knicks were on the right side to escape with a 105-104 victory.

articles.title: Updated NBA Finals Ticket Prices for Games 3, 4 at MSG After Knicks Take 2-0 Series Lead vs. Spurs - Bleacher Report
articles.description: The New York Knicks have taken a 2-0 lead in the best-of-seven NBA Finals after defeating the host San Antonio Spurs 105-104 on Friday evening.

articles.title: Reports: NCAA rejects Texas Tech's appeal to reinstate Sorsby - ESPN
articles.description: The NCAA has denied Texas Tech's appeal to reinstate quarterback Brendan Sorsby's eligibility, according to multiple reports.

articles.title: Knicks-Spurs was most-watched NBA Finals Game 1 since 2018 - NBA.com
articles.description: New York's thrilling win over San Antonio averaged 16.93 million viewers on ABC, up 90% from last year's Game 1.

articles.title: Caleb Williams pays homage to Michael Jordan on Madden 27 cover - NBC Sports
articles.description: Caleb Williams wants to trademark the nickname of one Basketball Hall of Famer, but he wants to be like another.

articles.title: Stadium Workers Authorize Strike Ahead Of The World Cup - HuffPost
articles.description: Thousands of cooks, dishwashers, concessions workers, bartenders and servers at SoFi Stadium are threatening to picket, citing insufficient pay, erosion of jobs, and plans for ICE to be at the games.

articles.title: Latest On Clippers Investigation - Hoops Rumors
articles.description: Kawhi Leonard and Clippers owner Steve Ballmer have reportedly been interviewed as part of the lengthy investigation.

articles.title: Myles Garrett Trade Fallout: Rams, Eagles, Verse - NFL Rumors - ProFootballRumors.com
articles.description: The package the Browns finally accepted in exchange for defensive end Myles Garrett was the best of three offers the Rams made...

articles.title: Gio Ruggiero takes third victory of 2026 in rain-shortened Henry Ford Health 200 at Michigan - arcaracing.com
articles.description: Gio Ruggiero won a rain-shortened Henry Ford Health 200 at Michigan International Speedway, his third victory of 2026.

articles.title: Giants blast seven home runs, including another grand slam, in rout of Cubs - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.description: Matt Chapman had a grand slam and eight RBIs and joined Willy Adames and Casey Schmitt in hitting two homers apiece as the San Francisco Giants routed the Cubs.

articles.title: Heightened security for Trump attending NBA Finals includes ban on all bags at Madison Square Garden - CBS News
articles.description: As President Trump prepares to watch the New York Knicks take on the San Antonio Spurs at Madison Square Garden, officials are planning for a heightened security posture, sources said.

articles.title: Ramón Laureano Undergoes Hip Surgery, Most Likely Done For Season - MLB Trade Rumors
articles.description: The Padres will probably be without their Opening Day left fielder for the rest of the season. Find more at MLB Trade Rumors.

articles.title: DI Cabinet modifies age-based eligibility concept - NCAA.org
articles.description: The Division I Cabinet on Friday continued to discuss elements of the age-based eligibility model that could be considered for a formal vote as early as the end of this month.

articles.title: Yankees' Aaron Judge Talks 'Made Up' Rib Injury Return Timetable, Spencer Jones Recalled - Bleacher Report
articles.description: The New York Yankees are adding outfield reinforcements with Aaron Judge set to miss time with a stress fracture in his rib.

articles.title: Seattle mayor shifts stance, agrees to turn on cameras - The Seattle Times
articles.description: Seattle Mayor Katie Wilson had said she would allow their installation but not turn them on unless a “credible threat” appeared.

articles.title: Broncos' Jonathon Cooper, LB's girlfriend reportedly arrested on suspicion of misdemeanor domestic violence, criminal mischief - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Cooper has started 17 games each of the past three seasons for Denver and has spent the first five years of his NFL career with the franchise.

Bears fans have strong reaction to team's renewed focus on Hammond, Indiana stadium site - Chicago Sun-Times
